name: lattice-scholar-extension
title: Lattice Scholar Extension
description: Search your Lattice literature library from Raycast
author: frank-miao

preferences.name: port
preferences.title: API Port
preferences.description: Port number for the Lattice local API (default: 52731)

preferences.name: preferredFormat
preferences.title: Preferred Export Format
preferences.description: Default format for the quick copy action. Use a structured format like bibtex, ris, csl-json, or a CSL filename from assets/styles without the .csl suffix.

preferences.name: clipboardFontFamily
preferences.title: Clipboard Font Family
preferences.description: Font family for rich-text citation exports to Word

preferences.name: clipboardFontSize
preferences.title: Clipboard Font Size
preferences.description: Font size in points for rich-text citation exports

commands.name: lattice-search
commands.title: Search Literature
commands.subtitle: Lattice Scholar Extension
commands.description: Search literature in your Lattice library

commands.name: lattice-status
commands.title: Check Connection
commands.subtitle: Lattice Scholar Extension
commands.description: Check Lattice local API connection status

commands.name: lattice-doi
commands.title: Find Paper by Current Page
commands.subtitle: Lattice Scholar Extension
commands.description: Detect the DOI on the current browser page and show paper metadata

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
